distinct_character: fourth character: verify(ConcordGate) -> design(Confluence) -> play(Meander) -> learn(Trellis)
co_evolution: transplants Meander's graph-traversal gene (fed back into the corpus) into the learning domain: a skill DAG instead of a maze grid

Implement.capability: skill DAG validate (cycle/missing, fail-closed) + deterministic topological ordering (alpha tie-break) + minimal prereq-closure plan + depth metrics + ASCII/SVG render

Verify.artifacts: assets/Trellis_hero.svg + examples/{curriculum.svg, plan.txt, skills.json} produced by the engine
Verify.invariants: topological validity (prereqs first), deterministic, fail-closed on cycles/missing

deliverable: Trellis/ — deterministic curriculum/skill-tree planner; single stdlib module, README(hero), LICENSE(MIT), examples/3, tests/18, cli_triplet sample/plan/check
honest_boundary: orders the prerequisite graph you give it; does not judge pedagogy or invent prerequisites (README noted).
next: publish independent repo + optionally another full-cycle turn (user standing-authorized repo create/commit/push)
